heading: Compression
body:
When you compress data files, they take less time to download. Reduced
download time has a greater performance benefit than parsing
uncompressed data.

You can compress the following file formats using [gzip](https://www.gnu.org/software/gzip/manual/gzip.html):

- JSON (Javascript Object Notation)

- BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation)

- [CSV](adf-csv-tsv-data)

- [CSV](adf-csv-tsv-data)
